name: AI Cybersecurity News (Past Week)
description: Discover AI-related cybersecurity news from the last 7 days focus on human risk management and security awareness.

inputs.value: Determine the correct date window for 'the past week from today'
Find AI-related cybersecurity news items published within the determined time window, and focus on human risk management and security awareness.
Remove duplicates/near-duplicates from the upstream articles list (same story syndicated across sources).
From the upstream deduped articles, identify the most discussed topic/theme.
From the upstream deduped articles, identify the most recent topic/theme.
From the upstream deduped articles, identify the most promising/impactful topic for the next 1-3 months (security + AI implications).

Write a detailed summary for each upstream deduped article. Include ALL important information from the article: key facts, technical details, statistics, quotes, threat actors mentioned, impacted organizations, timeline, why it matters.

Write a professional weekly cybersecurity newsletter in markdown format using all upstream outputs. Focus on topics relevant to managing human risk and security awareness. Structure:#Title
## Date Window

[2-3 sentence overview of the week's key themes and developments]

**Who's At Risk:** [Specific target sectors and use cases]

**Attack Methods:** [How the attacks work]

**What To Do:** [3-5 concrete action items]
